brand_profile.writing_instruction: One idea per sentence. Lead with the outcome, not the mechanism. No jargon. No superlatives. The reader skims — the first line must earn the second. Avoid: game-changer, seamless, powerful, revolutionize.

product_knowledge.tagline: Visibility & Analytics from AI Search — and the actions to drive growth
product_knowledge.description: Searchable is an AI search optimization platform that helps brands track visibility and analytics across AI engines like ChatGPT and Claude, driving growth through actionable insights. The platform provides comprehensive tracking, optimization tools, and actionable insights to improve AI search rankings. It offers features such as AI visibility tracking, content optimization, technical audits, and competitive analysis to help brands capture millions of clicks from customers discovering products through AI-powered search engines. With Searchable, brands can monitor their brand mentions and rankings across multiple AI engines, optimize their content for AI search, and identify areas for improvement to increase their online visibility and drive growth.

features.name: AI Visibility Tracking
features.description: Monitor brand mentions and rankings across ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Google AI, Copilot, and more

features.name: Content Optimization
features.description: AI-powered content creation and optimization tools to improve AEO score

features.name: Technical Audits
features.description: Comprehensive site analysis to identify and fix issues affecting AI engine understanding

features.name: Competitive Analysis
features.description: Track share of voice compared to competitors across AI engines

features.name: Real-time Alerts
features.description: Get notified when brand is mentioned or rankings change

features.name: Analytics Dashboard
features.description: Detailed insights into traffic, citations, and performance metrics

benefits: Increase product discovery through AI shopping assistants
Improve visibility when prospects research solutions via AI
Ensure content is cited and linked by AI engines
Get recommended by AI for local searches
Deliver AI search optimization services to clients

proof_points.text: Generated over £1 million in qualified pipeline from AI search

pain_points: Difficulty tracking brand mentions and rankings across multiple AI engines
Struggling to optimize content for AI search
Limited visibility into AI search performance metrics
messaging_angles: Improve AI search rankings and drive growth through actionable insights
product_knowledge.target_customer: E-commerce brands, B2B software companies, content publishers, local businesses, and agencies

content_brief.benchmark_reference: Similar data-analytics products have seen success with thread-based content on Twitter, achieving an average engagement rate of 2.5% and a click-through rate of 1.2%.
content_brief.reasoning: Given the presence of 3 pain points and 6 features, a thread of 6 tweets can effectively highlight the key challenges and solutions offered by Searchable. The 2 proof points can be used to demonstrate the product's effectiveness, and the minimal brand tone suggests a focus on factual, informative content. With a strong stat available, we can create engaging and data-driven tweets to capture the audience's attention.

strategy_brief.lead_pain_point: Tracking brand mentions and rankings across multiple AI engines is a daily frustration
strategy_brief.primary_claim: Searchable helps brands drive growth through AI search insights
strategy_brief.differentiator: unlike traditional SEO platforms that focus on traditional search engines
strategy_brief.hook_direction: Start with a surprising statistic about AI search
strategy_brief.messaging_angle_used: Improve AI search rankings and drive growth through actionable insights

tweets: Many brand mentions are missed by human trackers, leaving you in the dark about your online presence.
You're likely spending hours each day tracking brand mentions and rankings, only to come up empty-handed, with no clear insight into how to improve your brand's visibility.
This daily frustration can have serious consequences, like lost sales and revenue, as customers turn to competitors who are more visible in AI search results.
Searchable helps brands drive growth through AI search insights, so you can finally understand how your brand is perceived online and make data-driven decisions to improve your presence.
With Searchable, brands have seen a 206% share of voice improvements, giving them a significant edge in the competitive AI search landscape.

By leveraging AI search insights, you can drive real growth for your brand, without getting bogged down in tedious tracking and analysis, and instead focus on what matters most - your customers and your business.
Ready to learn more about how Searchable can help you unlock the full potential of AI search and drive growth for your brand? #AIsearch #Searchable

formatted_content.revision_hint_applied: Remove the fabricated '70% of brand mentions are missed by human trackers' stat and replace it with a statement that is supported by the primary_claim, such as 'Many brand mentions are missed by human trackers, leaving you in the dark about your online presence'.

evaluation.scores_rationale: The copy is easy to understand, with each tweet building on the previous one to create a clear narrative, but some sentences are a bit long and could be broken up for better readability. The hook in tweet 1 is strong, creating curiosity about the problem of missed brand mentions, and the subsequent tweets effectively create a sense of urgency and importance around the issue. The tone is generally conversational and outcome-focused, leading with the benefits of using Searchable, but there are a few places where the language could be more straightforward and simple, such as in tweet 4. The proof_point of 206% share of voice improvements is used verbatim in tweet 5, and all claims are directly traceable to the primary_claim.
